title: Ensuring the lessons from domestic homicide reviews lead to change
body: "‘Learning from loss: ensuring the lessons from domestic homicide reviews lead to change’ is a report  from the Domestic Abuse Commissioner. The report:   provides an overview of the domestic homicide review process highlights the need for accountability and central oversight outlines the work by the Domestic Abuse Commissioner to test an approach to this   The report also sets out a recommended blueprint for the national rollout of an accountability and oversight mechanism, and the benefits this could bring in improving the wider response to domestic abuse.  "
